name: Viper
description: A full-auto pistol known as the most compact and lightweight weapon of the Grineer arsenal. Though it has a small Magazine Capacity, the Viper has a very high Fire Rate and ultra-fast reload times thanks to a simplified magazine design.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A full-auto pistol known as the most compact and lightweight weapon of the Grineer arsenal. Though it has a small Magazine Capacity, the Viper has a very high Fire Rate and ultra-fast reload times thanks to a simplified magazine design.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Specific Weapons (E.g. Any variant of Braton or Viper) not playing their Reload animation during any Jump state (E.g. Double/Bullet Jump, Wall Run/Jump).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.9.0
patchlogs.changes: Viper Wraith damage reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Viper Wraith not being tradeable.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed using the Viper with the Skull Shots Mod or a Grakata with the Brain Storm Mod, activating the headshot bonus with the final shot in your magazine resulting in the weapon to fire much faster than intended in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the hips of Warframe’s appearing to stretch when playing Agile Akimbo, (Twin Vipers, Twin Grakatas, etc) Bow, and Pistol idles.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Viper series damage increased in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons have now been balanced for use in PvP: Sybaris, Karak, Kraken, Viper, Angstrum, AKViper, WraithViper and Tigris.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.changes: The Viper, Dual Vipers and Wraith Twin Vipers have been given a visual and audio overhaul!

patchlogs.name: Update 15.12.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Viper not having the correct tint on its Forest camouflage skin.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Viper: Stinging Truth: Adds 10 magazine capacity

patchlogs.name: Update 13: Dark Sectors

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Twin Vipers having redundant flashlight.

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes:
Refined the tint options on the Burston, Viper, Gram, Furis, Afuris, Dera, Furax, and Boltor.
Shield Lancers now use Grineer Viper instead of Tenno weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.7.3: Level Expansions And New Weapons!
patchlogs.fixes:
New Ether Melee Weapons and Twin Vipers will devastate the enemy. New Level Expansions to be explored and conquered await you, Tenno!
New Weapon: Twin Vipers
